name: Tall Arabian Posse
description: The TAP Boyz (The Arabian Posse) was a Chicago-based Arab-American street gang formed in 1992 at 63rd Street and Kedzie Avenue. Formed in response to anti-Arab sentiment from rival gangs following the Gulf War — their goal was to protect the Arab-American community from racially motivated assaults. Allied with Latin Kings. Disbanded in 1999 after losing members to Gangster Two-Six and Almighty Ambrose. Colors were white and red; symbol was a four-pointed star, occasionally using a crescent moon to represent Islam. Also had presence in Bridgeview, Illinois. Independent of Folk and People Nations.

sources.title: Tall Arabian Posse - Chicago Gang History
